summary: A Newsmax remote interview with ICE Deputy Director Madison Sheehan defending due process and officers wearing masks, blaming Democrat rhetoric for endangering agents. It is a televised news interview, not a produced or music-driven youth-appeal piece.
notable_text: NEWSMAX; 'NATIONAL REPORT — NEWSOM DEFENDS MASK BAN FOR ICE AGENTS'; 'Madison Sheehan | Deputy Director, ICE'
